summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard from the hydrated preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations, fixes, merges, or closeouts are safe or permitted here: instant close, low-signal close, fix PR, merge, and post-merge close are disabled, and several PRs require maintainer review, real behavior proof, or technical correctness judgment.
